channel.title: progsu
channel.description: Georgia State University's Programming Club - Join us for coding, events, and community!

item.title: FW'25 Kick off x Tournament
item.description: Show you Rock Paper Scissors skills for a chance to win 100$ and eat sum za What to Expect: Meet the club leadership team and learn about our mission ...
